subcodes.first_line: That which thou didst compose hath been presented before Us, and God hath accepted from thee that which thy tongue hath uttered and thy pen hath inscribed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر بین یدینا ما انشات و قد قبل الله منک ما تفوه به لسانک و جری علیه قلمک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital, @Greatest Name
